description: Add a format-neutral normalized input contract and optional Croissant ML and Frictionless Data ingestion providers without coupling source parsers to VOI calculation kernels.

approval.evidence: User requested incorporation of the previously presented architecture and issue plan into the existing Conductor system, GitHub issues/sub-issues, and project.

gates.evidence: User approval recorded on 2026-07-23; issue #325 and native sub-issues #326-#333 created.

Commit 67e079e and GitHub issues #325-#333 incorporate versioned binding profiles, materialization receipts, governance metadata, controlled provider discovery, and data-quality reporting; focused tests, harness, setup validation, and Vale passed.
Commit 211e7aa adds Conductor requirements and phases; issues #467 and #468 are native children of #325 and Project 28 items; cross-reference commit 68bedc01 updates PR #465's central manifest.

PR #334 (merged 2026-07-24) delivers the tested baseline contract, preparation layer, optional Croissant/Frictionless profiles, CLI, DataFrame adapter, and reference documentation. The full acceptance plan remains active: its uncompleted conformance, security, SDK, and cross-domain case criteria cannot be represented as complete.
PR #465 merged before PR #334; PR #334 was rebased on current main and merged as 5ee86837e6d9758974db0193f9db072c91600def.
Separate Dependabot PR #324 merged; this gate records its integration ordering only and does not claim it as ingestion functionality.
PR #334 source head 083cc93a passed required hosted CI run 30065658392 and strict operational-assurance run 30065658517 on 2026-07-24; changed lines and branches met their 95%/100% thresholds.

PR #477 merged as d07eed2b on 2026-07-24 after every required hosted check passed. It propagates normalized-input and binding-profile identities through AnalysisSpec, RunContext, diagnostics, and provenance; it does not complete the remaining programme acceptance criteria.
